commands.review_summary:
The PR updates model-ref normalization in runtime/plugin fallback paths, changes Google Vertex stream transport selection and base URL normalization, and allows `ensureAbsoluteDirectory` to accept symlinked directories with regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked bugs are source-reproducible on current main: model refs can double-prefix, Google Vertex routing is bypassed by the Generative AI branch, and `ensureAbsoluteDirectory` rejects symlinked directories via `lstat`.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed because the external PR lacks real behavior proof and the provider routing change has a concrete security-sensitive defect before merge.

target.title: fix: model ref normalization, Vertex transport routing, symlink workspace dirs
target.body:
## Summary

Fixes three unrelated bugs reported in open issues:

- **#84887** — Plugin LLM allowlist diagnostics no longer double-prefix provider-qualified model refs (e.g. `openrouter/openrouter/gpt-5.4-mini`).
- **#84804** — `google-vertex` models route to the Vertex transport when provider, `api`, or `aiplatform.googleapis.com` base URL indicates Vertex, instead of requiring ADC preflight and falling through to Generative AI (404).
- **#84696** — `ensureAbsoluteDirectory` follows symlinks to directories so workspace paths like `memory -> target/` work with the write tool.

## Changes

### Model references (#84887)

- Use `modelKey()` in plugin runtime LLM allowlist normalization and gateway fallback model resolution.
- Fix `formatLiteralProviderPrefixedModelRef` to return already-qualified refs unchanged.

### Google Vertex (#84804)

- Select Vertex transport when `model.provider === "google-vertex"`, `model.api === "google-vertex"`, or base URL matches Vertex AI Platform.
- Remove ADC sync gate from `createStreamFn` selection.
- Skip Generative AI base URL normalization when `google-vertex` already points at `aiplatform.googleapis.com`.

### Filesystem (#84696)

- Use `fs.stat` instead of `fs.lstat` in `ensureAbsoluteDirectory` so symlinked directories are accepted.

## Test plan

- [x] `pnpm exec vitest run src/plugins/runtime/runtime-llm.runtime.test.ts`
- [x] `pnpm exec vitest run extensions/google/provider-registration.test.ts extensions/google/api.test.ts`
- [x] `pnpm exec vitest run src/infra/fs-safe.ensure-absolute-directory.test.ts src/agents/model-ref-shared.test.ts`

Closes #84887, #84804, #84696

Made with [Cursor](https://cursor.com)
